release_card.summary: 0.0.11-pre is a walking skeleton plus follow-up hardening release with app/CLI visibility fallback, MCP app-panel render metadata, subagent activity projection, diagnostic smoke routing, completed diagnostic fan-in closure, optional Tolaria mirrors, and branch consolidation recorded.
documented_flow: subagent activity and task ownership projection
optional Tolaria graph and memory mirrors
validation: source repo main pushed at fdf7888
cargo test -p ccc passed with 224 tests
cargo build passed for darwin arm64, darwin x86_64, linux arm64, linux x86_64, and windows x86_64
app-panel payload/text test proves subagent activity names child agent, role, lane, task, and lifecycle status
app-panel artifact smoke created CCC_LONGWAY_PANEL.md and CCC_LONGWAY_PANEL.json
task-card fan-in resolve regression proves completed smoke runs close instead of staying active/await_fan_in
branch cleanup leaves only main and origin/main
darwin arm64, darwin x86_64, linux arm64, linux x86_64, and windows x86_64 tarballs refreshed on 2026-05-04
macOS packaged binaries report 0.0.11-pre; Linux and Windows assets are package-verifiable on macOS but require native host validation
